news.summary: In McKinney, Texas, on April 15, 2025, Globe Life Inc. (NYSE: GL) has disclosed the upcoming live audio webcast for its 2025 Annual Meeting of Shareholders set for Thursday, April 24, 2025, at 10:00am Central Time. Interested individuals can register online to participate in the event by visiting proxypush.com/GL. Those who are registered...
news.headline: Globe Life Inc. to hold virtual 2025 shareholders' meeting on April 24 at 10am Central, register at proxypush.com/GL.

news.summary: A recent study conducted in Guilford, Connecticut, explored the effectiveness and patient satisfaction of a portable MRI device powered by artificial intelligence (AI) in neurology offices. The study analyzed how this innovative technology could benefit clinicians and patients.
news.headline: Hyperfine enrolls initial patients in NEURO PMR study to evaluate AI-powered portable MRI in neurology offices.

news.summary: Chicago-based CCC Intelligent Solutions Holdings Inc. (NASDAQ: CCCS), a prominent cloud platform for the P&C insurance industry, stated that it is set to unveil its financial outcomes for the initial quarter of 2025, concluding on March 31, 2025, before the U.S. financial markets commence on Tuesday, May 6, 2025. Concurrently, the company plans to conduct a conference call on the morning of Tuesday, May 6, 2025, at 8:00 a.m. (Eastern Time) to deliberate on the firm's financial performance.
news.headline: CCC Intelligent Solutions will report Q1 2025 earnings on May 6, 2025, before U.S. markets open with a conference call at 8:00 am ET.

news.summary: Frontier Communications Parent, Inc. (NASDAQ: FYBR) based in Dallas has disclosed that it will divulge its financial results for the first quarter of 2025 after the market closes on Tuesday, April 29, 2025. This announcement comes in the wake of an ongoing acquisition deal between Frontier and Verizon Communications Inc., which was first announced on September 4, 2024. In this agreement, Verizon is set to acquire Frontier Communications Parent, Inc. The exact financial figures and additional details regarding the acquisition are yet to be unveiled during the upcoming disclosure.
news.headline: Frontier will report Q1 2025 earnings on April 29, 2025. Verizon to acquire Frontier Communications Parent, Inc.

news.summary: Ride-hailing company Lyft, Inc. (Nasdaq: LYFT) is set to announce its financial performance for Q1 2025 after the market closes on Thursday, May 8, 2025. Following this release, Lyft will conduct a conference call at 2:00 p.m. PT (5:00 p.m. ET) on the same day to delve into the financial results and key business achievements. For those interested, the live audio webcast can be accessed via the company's Investor Relations page at https://investor.lyft.com/. The webcast will also be archived for later access.
news.headline: Lyft (Nasdaq: LYFT) to announce first quarter 2025 financial results on May 8, 2025, after market close. Call at 2:00pm PT.

news.summary: Electronic Arts Inc. (NASDAQ: EA) is set to announce its financial results for the fiscal quarter and fiscal year ending March 31, 2025 after market close on Tuesday, May 6, 2025. Alongside the release, EA will conduct a conference call to analyze the financial outcomes for the mentioned periods, as well as provide insights into future projections and potential significant updates impacting its business or financial standing. This signifies a crucial event for investors and industry observers to gain valuable information regarding EA's performance and direction.
news.headline: EA will release its fiscal Q4 and FY2025 results on May 6, 2025. Conference call to follow.

news.summary: Seagate Technology Holdings plc, a major player in mass-capacity data storage, is set to announce its fiscal Q3 2025 financial results on April 29, 2025, after market closure. The conference call for investors to review these results will occur at 2:00 PM PT / 5:00 PM ET on the same day. To listen to the call live, visit Seagate's Investor Relations website investors.seagate.com. Seagate is listed on NASDAQ under the ticker STX.
news.headline: Seagate Technology (NASDAQ: STX) will report fiscal Q3 2025 results on April 29, 2025 after market close. Conference call at 2:00 PM PT / 5:00 PM ET.

news.summary: indie Semiconductor, a leading automotive solutions innovator traded under Nasdaq as INDI, is set to host a conference call with analysts to review its performance for the first quarter of 2025 and provide insights on its future prospects. The event is scheduled for May 12, 2025, at 5:00 p.m. Eastern time. Alongside this, on the same day after market close, indie Semiconductor will release its earnings press release through Business Wire. For those interested, the press release will be accessible on indie's website at https.
news.headline: indie Semiconductor (Nasdaq: INDI) to release Q1 2025 earnings on May 12 at 5:00pm EST, with a conference call for analysts.

news.summary: In San Francisco, Pinterest, Inc. (NYSE: PINS) is set to announce its financial outcomes for the initial quarter of 2025 on Thursday, May 8th, 2025 post market closure. At 1:30 p.m. PT (4:30 p.m. ET) on the same day, the company will conduct a conference call to review these results. Interested individuals can tune into a live webcast of the call and access associated earnings release materials on Pinterest’s Investor Relations site at investor.pinterest.com. Following the event, a replay of the webcast will be accessible.
news.headline: Pinterest (NYSE: PINS) to announce Q1 2025 results on May 8th after market close, with conference call at 1:30 p.m. PT. Visit investor.pinterest.com.

news.summary: Seattle-based Starbucks Coffee Company (Nasdaq: SBUX) has announced that it will report its financial results for the second quarter of fiscal year 2025 after the market closes on Tuesday, April 29, 2025. Following the release, a conference call is scheduled at 2:00 p.m. Pacific Time on the same day. The conference call, which will also have closed captioning, will be webcast and can be accessed through the company’s website at https://investor.starbucks.com/. A replay of the webcast will be available on the same website until the end of the day on Friday, June 13, 20.
news.headline: Starbucks announces Q2 FY 2025 results conference call on Tuesday, April 29, 2025, at 2:00 p.m. PT. Webcast accessible on their website.

news.summary: Spokane, Washington – Clearwater Paper Corporation (NYSE: CLW) is set to announce its first quarter 2025 financial results on Tuesday, April 29, 2025, once the market closes.
news.headline: Clearwater Paper (NYSE: CLW) to release Q1 2025 results on April 29, 2025, after market close.

news.summary: On April 15, 2025, Flamingo Therapeutics revealed that an abstract has been approved for showcasing at the American Association for Cancer Research (AACR) annual meeting in Chicago, IL. The company, headquartered in Leuven, Belgium, and Strasbourg, France, along with a presence in Philadelphia, shared this significant development.
news.headline: Flamingo Therapeutics presents on immune-modulatory effects of Danvatirsen at AACR. Abstract accepted at meeting in Chicago.

news.summary: Resideo Technologies, Inc., headquartered in Scottsdale, Arizona, is a prominent global company specializing in manufacturing, developing, and distributing technology-based sensing and control products for residential and commercial sectors. The company, traded on the NYSE under the symbol REZI, will be disclosing its financial performance for the first quarter of 2025.
news.headline: Resideo (NYSE: REZI) will report Q1 2025 financial results on May 6, 2025. Leading tech manufacturer for residential and commercial markets.

news.summary: Maumee, OH - The Andersons, Inc. (NASDAQ: ANDE) is set to unveil its first-quarter 2025 financial results post 4 p.m. Eastern Time on Tuesday, May 6, 2025. Following this, on Wednesday, May 7, 2025, at 8:30 a.m. Eastern Time, the company will conduct a webcast to delve into the numbers and provide insights.
news.headline: The Andersons, Inc. (Nasdaq: ANDE) to share Q1 2025 results on May 6 at 4 p.m. Webcast discussion on May 7 at 8:30 a.m.

news.summary: In a recent announcement, The Kroger Co. (NYSE: KR) revealed key appointments within its retail divisions. Joe Kelley has been appointed Senior Vice President of Retail Divisions, while Kenny Kimball takes on the role of Smith's Division President, Chris Albi as King Soopers Division President, and Kendra Doyel as Food 4 Less Division President. This update came on April 15, 2025, from Cincinnati.
news.headline: Kroger appoints key leaders: Joe Kelley SVP, Kenny Kimball Smith's Div President, Chris Albi King Soopers Div President, Kendra Doyel Food 4 Less Div President. CINCINNATI, April 15, 2025.

news.summary: In Mississauga, Ontario on April 15, 2025, Cymat Technologies Ltd. disclosed that they have obtained the green light from the TSX Venture Exchange for their non-brokered private placement of equity Units. The Company, known as Cymat, is listed as TSXV: CYM and OTCQB: CYMHF. This news marks a significant development for Cymat as they proceed with the Offering.
news.headline: Cymat Technologies Ltd. receives TSX-V approval for $1.3M private placement financing.

news.summary: A webcast will be held at 2 p.m. PT / 5 p.m. ET on April 15, 2025, featuring Zillow Group, Inc. (Nasdaq: Z and ZG). The company disclosed that its first-quarter 2025 financial results will be made public on May 7, 2025, after the market closes. During the event, a webcast will be presented by the company.
news.headline: Zillow Group will announce Q1 2025 results on May 7 via a webcast at 2 p.m. PT / 5 p.m. ET. Market close is the deadline.

news.summary: The latest MicroLED Smart Backlight technology will be showcased at booth M505 by Smartkem during Touch Taiwan 2025. Ian Jenks, the CEO of Smartkem, is scheduled to present a keynote address on this innovation. The company, listed on Nasdaq as SMTK, is based in Manchester, England. The event is set to take place on April 15, 2025.
news.headline: Smartkem showcasing MicroLED Smart Backlight at Touch Taiwan 2025; CEO to address, Nasdaq: $SMTK.

news.summary: Abilene, TX - On April 29, 2025, at 10:30 a.m. Central time, First Financial Bankshares, Inc. (NASDAQ: FFIN) is scheduled to conduct its 2025 Annual Shareholders' Meeting. The event, featuring F. Scott Dueser, Chairman and CEO, among others, will be broadcast live. This news was released on April 15, 2025.
news.headline: First Financial Bankshares to live stream annual meeting on April 29, 2025 at 10:30 am CT. CEO F. Scott Dueser to address shareholders.

news.summary: On April 15, 2025, in Alhambra, California, Astrana Health, Inc. (NASDAQ: ASTH) - a prominent healthcare organization facilitating accessible care via technology - made a significant announcement. This company, along with its subsidiaries, is at the forefront of empowering providers.
news.headline: Astrana Health, Inc. plans to release 2025 first quarter financial results; conference call to be scheduled. $ASTH NASDAQ

news.summary: Austin, TX - On April 15, 2025, Valuease, Inc., an emerging player in property technology, revealed their latest offering in the form of CMAsnap Rentals. This innovative feature is an expansion of their successful Comparative Market Analysis (CMA) tool, CMAsnap. This addition aims to revolutionize rental pricing in the industry.
news.headline: Valuease, Inc. introduces CMAsnap Rentals feature, modernizing property management with powerful CMA tool.

news.summary: On April 15, 2025, STAG Industrial, Inc. disclosed entering a note purchase agreement to release $550 million in fixed rate senior unsecured notes through a private placement offering. The notes carry a weighted average fixed interest rate. STAG is listed on the NYSE under the symbol STAG.
news.headline: STAG Industrial to issue $550 million senior unsecured notes with fixed interest rate in private placement deal.

news.summary: In Calgary, Alberta, on April 15, 2025, Freehold Royalties Ltd. (Freehold) (TSX: FRU) has revealed that the Board of Directors approved a dividend of Cdn. $0.09 per common share. The payment date for this dividend is set for May 15, 2025, and it will be distributed to shareholders who are recorded as such on April 30, 2025.
news.headline: Freehold Royalties (TSX: FRU) declares dividend of Cdn. $0.09 per common share to be paid on May 15, 2025.

news.summary: On April 30, 2025, New York Mortgage Trust, Inc. (Nasdaq: NYMT) will release its financial results for the first quarter of 2025 after the market closes. The Company's executive management will conduct a conference call and audio webcast on May 1, 2025, at 9:00 a.m. Eastern Time. To participate in the call, registration is required through a provided link. Registered participants will receive confirmation and details for dialing in to the conference call.
news.headline: New York Mortgage Trust to report Q1 financial results on April 30, 2025, with conference call on May 1 at 9:00 a.m. ET.

news.summary: In Albuquerque, New Mexico on April 15, 2025, ARRAY Technologies, Inc. (Nasdaq: ARRY), a prominent provider of utility-scale solar tracking solutions, shared plans to unveil their first quarter financial results for 2025. The disclosure is scheduled for Tuesday, May 6, 2025, before the market opens. A corresponding conference call is set for 8:00 a.m. (Eastern Time) on the same day to discuss these results.
news.headline: ARRAY Technologies, Inc. will release Q1 2025 earnings on May 6, 2025, with conference call at 8:00 a.m. ET.

news.summary: Sernova Biotherapeutics, a prominent regenerative medicine company, revealed that their Cell Pouch Bio-hybrid Organ, intended as a functional cure for type 1 diabetes (T1D), will be showcased at the 2025 Cell & Gene Meeting on the Med conference in Rome, Italy on Wednesday, April 16, 2025. The company's stock (TSX: SVA) (OTCQB: SEOVF) (FSE/XETRA: PSH) will be discussed in a panel session titled Diabetes – Cell and Tissue Therapy Approaches to Provide Durable Therapeutic Solutions. This event marks a significant step in advancing the innovative treatment, aimed at providing lasting solutions for T1D patients.
news.headline: Sernova Biotherapeutics to showcase Cell Pouch Bio-hybrid Organ for diabetes at Cell & Gene Meeting, April 16 in Rome.

news.summary: According to recent reports from industry analysts, the global smartphone market witnessed a decline of 5.7% in sales during the last quarter of 2021 compared to the previous year. The total number of smartphones sold during this quarter was approximately 330 million units. Market leaders like Apple and Samsung also experienced a decrease in sales, with Apple selling around 68 million units and Samsung selling approximately 62 million units. Despite these challenges, Chinese smartphone companies like Xiaomi and Oppo saw growth in their sales figures, capturing a larger market share in various regions. Overall, the smartphone market continues to face challenges due to supply chain disruptions and changing consumer behaviors.
news.headline: Trade tensions escalate as Japan struggles to secure favorable terms; implications for global markets.

news.summary: In the first quarter of 2025, there was a total revenue of $3.7 billion, showing an organic growth of 3.4%. The net income for this period was $287.7 million. The diluted earnings per share were reported at $1.45, whereas the non-GAAP adjusted earnings per share stood at $1.70. The operating income was $452.6 million on a non-GAAP adjusted basis. Additionally, the non-GAAP adjusted EBITA was $508.2 million, showcasing a margin of 13.8%. This information was released from New York on April 15, 2025.
news.headline: Omnicom's Q1 2025 revenue $3.7B, organic growth 3.4%, net income $287.7M, diluted EPS $1.45, margin 13.8%.

news.summary: Inseego has recently appointed a new product innovator to T-Mobile, aiming to enhance carrier-focused product innovation and bolster its market presence. This move signifies Inseego's strategic growth plan and commitment to delivering cutting-edge solutions to customers. With this addition to its leadership team, Inseego aims to capitalize on emerging opportunities in the market and further solidify its position as a leader in the industry.
news.headline: Ryan Sullivan, T-Mobile product innovator, joins Inseego as SVP of Carrier Product Management, enhancing market position.
Sasidhar Valluru named director of global product delivery at Healthcare Integrated Technologies Inc.

news.summary: In December 2024, the preliminary findings from the randomized Phase 2 CRDF-004 study in patients with RAS-mutated metastatic colorectal cancer (mCRC) were disclosed.
news.headline: Cardiff Oncology finishes enrolling for Phase 2 CRDF-004 trial on Onvansertib for 1st-line RAS-mutated mCRC; initial results by Dec 2024.

news.summary: In Dallas on April 15, 2025, Texas Capital Bancshares, Inc. (NASDAQ: TCBI) declared that Rob C. Holmes, the President & Chief Executive Officer, has been appointed as the Chairman of the Board following TCBI’s 2025 Annual Meeting of Stockholders. Holmes, in his role since 2021, was chosen unanimously for this position by the Board of Directors in January 2025.
news.headline: Rob C. Holmes is now Chairman of the Board at Texas Capital Bancshares, Inc. (NASDAQ: TCBI) after unanimous election.

news.summary: Nobel Prize laureates Prof. Shechtman and Prof. Kornberg have teamed up to progress treatments for Autism Spectrum Disorder and Alzheimer’s Disease.  Collaborating on research initiatives, they aim to leverage their expertise to make strides in combating these prevalent disorders impacting millions worldwide. Their combined knowledge and dedication are poised to drive advancements in the field and potentially pave the way for groundbreaking therapeutic solutions.
news.headline: NeuroNOS appoints Nobel Laureate Shechtman to the Advisory Board, along with Kornberg, for treatments for Autism and Alzheimer's.

news.summary: On April 15, 2025, Mondelēz International, Inc. (Nasdaq: MDLZ) unveiled its 2024 Snacking Made Right Report, showcasing advancements towards its Sustainability objectives. The report emphasizes the Company's continuous efforts to enhance the sustainability of snacking, affirming its pledge to prioritize Sustainability as a fundamental component of its overarching Strategy, aligning it with Growth, Execution, and Culture.
news.headline: Mondelēz International releases 2024 Sustainability report, focusing on making snacking more sustainable. Commitment to Sustainability emphasized.
Cricut will release Q1 2025 financial results on May 6, 2025.

news.summary: On April 15, 2025, Ingredion Incorporated, a prominent supplier of ingredient solutions to the food manufacturing sector, announced that it will disclose its financial outcomes for the first quarter of 2025, concluding on March 31, 2025. These results are scheduled to be made available before the market opens on Tuesday, May 6, 2025. Ingredion Incorporated is listed on the New York Stock Exchange under the ticker symbol INGR.
news.headline: Ingredion (NYSE: INGR) to release Q1 2025 financial results on May 6, 2025 following period ended March 31, 2025.

news.summary: Rapid7 has revealed that it will unveil its financial results for the first quarter of 2025 on Monday, May 12, 2025, immediately after the closure of the financial markets.
news.headline: Rapid7 to announce Q1 2025 financial results on May 12 after market close.

news.summary: On April 15, 2025, PennantPark Floating Rate Capital Ltd. revealed that PennantPark Senior Secured Loan Fund I LLC successfully completed a $301 million debt securitization through its subsidiary, PennantPark CLO 12, LLC. This collateralized loan obligation has a four-year reinvestment period and a final maturity of twelve years. The announcement was made by the Company, listed on NYSE as PFLT, indicating the closure of the CLO or Securitization deal.
news.headline: PennantPark Senior Secured Loan Fund I LLC completes $301 million securitization through CLO 12 for continued growth.

news.summary: In a recent announcement, the Campbell’s Company (NASDAQ:CPB) based in Camden, New Jersey disclosed significant senior management changes aimed at advancing their strategic plan and fostering ongoing growth. Elizabeth Duggan, who currently serves as Senior Vice President and General Manager of Campbell’s Company of Canada, has been assigned as the President of the Snacks division, with her new position taking effect from May 12, 2025. Meanwhile, Janda Lukin, the current Senior Vice President and Chief Marketing Officer for Snacks, has transitioned into a newly established role within the company.
news.headline: Campbell’s Company appoints new leaders for growth strategy. Elizabeth Duggan becomes President of Snacks division.

news.summary: Palo Alto, California, April 15, 2025 - Upwork Inc. (Nasdaq: UPWK), the leading global platform linking companies with freelance professionals, disclosed plans to reveal its first quarter 2025 financial outcomes on Monday, May 5, 2025, post-market closure. An earnings discussion via a Q&A conference call is set for 2:00 p.m. PT (5:00 p.m. ET) on the identical day.
news.headline: Upwork to release Q1 2025 financial results on May 5, 2025 after-market close; Conference call at 2 pm PT.

news.summary: Today, in a significant deal, RadNet, Inc. (NASDAQ: RDNT), a prominent provider of diagnostic imaging services, and iCAD, Inc. (NASDAQ: ICAD), a leading provider of AI-powered breast health solutions, have agreed to a merger. The acquisition will be executed through an all-stock transaction. RadNet is recognized nationally for its high-quality and affordable diagnostic imaging services, while iCAD is a global leader in AI-powered breast health solutions. This merger agreement holds notable importance for both companies and the industry.
news.headline: RadNet to acquire iCAD to enhance AI-driven early breast cancer detection. Deal includes all-stock transaction.

news.summary: In Duluth, Minnesota, ALLETE, Inc. (NYSE:ALE) has received recognition as an Honor Roll Company of Special Distinction in the 2024 Minnesota Census of Women in Corporate Leadership. This accolade highlights the company's commitment to gender diversity and inclusion in leadership positions. Women hold significant roles within the organization, emphasizing ALLETE's dedication to fostering a diverse and inclusive workplace.
news.headline: ALLETE, Inc. (NYSE: ALE) honored for promoting women in leadership with Special Distinction in 2024 Minnesota Census.
Bitcoin's momentum halts; Fed's Bostic warns of unclear economic future.

news.summary: The European Union anticipates that the United States will maintain tariffs in place. This development was disclosed in the "Balance of Power: Early Edition" report dated April 15, 2025. The continuation of tariffs is expected to impact various sectors and industries within the EU. This forecast comes amid ongoing trade tensions between the EU and the US, with the EU projecting significant economic ramifications if the tariffs persist. The specifics of the tariffs and their potential impact on trade and investments remain key concerns for both the EU and the US as they navigate their trade relations.
news.headline: EU projects US tariffs will persist. Stay informed with Balance of Power: Early Edition 04/15/2025.

news.summary: MYR Group Inc., a leading holding company of specialty contractors in the U.S. and Canada serving electric utility infrastructure, commercial, and industrial construction markets, is set to partake in the Oppenheimer Annual Industrial Growth investor conference. The company will be represented by its Chief Executive Officer, Rick Swartz, and Chief Financial Officer, Kelly Huntington, who will virtually engage with institutional investors during the Oppenheimer 20th Annual Industrial Growth Conference on May 6, 2025. This exclusive event is limited to Oppenheimer clients and will provide an opportunity for MYR Group to showcase its offerings and strategies to potential investors. MYR Group operates on the NASDAQ exchange under the ticker symbol MYRG.
news.headline: MYR Group Inc. to join Oppenheimer Annual Industrial Growth Conference in May. CEO and CFO to meet investors virtually on May 6.

news.summary: In the first quarter, the pre-tax margin has increased by 4.9 points compared to the previous year, surpassing the expectations of Wall Street. On an adjusted basis, the pre-tax margin saw an increase of 3.6 points. It is anticipated that in Q1, United will lead the industry in pre-tax margin as they continue to attract a growing number of loyal customers to their brand. This success is attributed to the enhancements in customer experience and the display of resilience within the company.
news.headline: United Airlines has strong Q1 financial performance with pre-tax margin up 4.9 points YOY, surpassing Wall Street expectations.

news.summary: In Sacramento, California, on April 15, 2025, it was reported by the California Commission on Teacher Credentialing that there has been an increase in the issuance of new teaching credentials in the academic year of 2023-24. This rise indicates a positive shift in tackling the teacher shortage in the state. In total, a significant number of new teaching credentials were issued during this period.
news.headline: Increase in new teaching credentials issued by California Commission on Teacher Credentialing in 2023-24, addressing teacher shortage.

news.summary: On April 15, 2025, Century Therapeutics, Inc. revealed that they will host a live fireside chat on April 22, 2025, at 10:00 a.m. EDT. The company, traded as NASDAQ: IPSC, specializes in developing induced pluripotent stem cell (iPSC)-derived cell therapies for autoimmune disease and cancer. During the chat, they will delve into the specifics and data of their key preclinical cell therapy projects aimed at treating autoimmune diseases and cancer.
news.headline: Century Therapeutics (NASDAQ: IPSC) plans fireside chat on 04/22/25 for iPSC-derived cell therapies targeting autoimmune diseases and cancer.

news.summary: Inventiva, a biopharmaceutical company listed on Euronext Paris and Nasdaq under the ticker symbol IVA, has recently submitted its 2024 Universal Registration Document to the French Autorité des Marchés Financiers and its 2024 Annual Report on Form 20-F to the U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission. The documents cover the fiscal year ending December 31, 2024, and include the management report and annual financial report. The company specializes in developing oral small molecule therapies for metabolic dysfunction-associated steatohepatitis (MASH) and other medical conditions with high levels of unmet need. This announcement was made on April 15, 2025, with Daix, France, and New York City, United States, serving as the key locations.
news.headline: Inventiva files 2024 Registration Document and Form 20-F in France and US for Year Ended Dec 31, 2024.

news.summary: In a recent report, it was disclosed that the economy grew by 4.3% in the first quarter of the year, surpassing expectations of a 3.9% growth. This growth was mainly driven by a significant increase in consumer spending, which rose by 6.2% during this period. Additionally, exports also saw a boost, growing by 5.5%. However, investment in the economy saw a slight decline of 1.1%. Overall, these figures suggest a positive outlook for the economy in the coming months, with analysts predicting a growth rate of around 3.8% for the year.
news.headline: Mexico stops fuel imports at Texas border and increases inspections.
